title: Vaccine Administration Resources | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:
ine Storage and Handling Toolkit is a comprehensive guide that reflects best practices from the Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices recommendations, vaccine manufacturers product information, and scientific studies. 
Vaccine Storage and Handling Toolkit 
This toolkit is a comprehensive guide to best practices for vaccine storage and handling from ACIP. 
Download 
Download 
Vaccine Storage and Handling Resources 
Resources to help health care professionals with vaccine storage and handling. 
Web-Based Training Courses 
CDC offers a variety of webcasts and self-study education and training programs for health care personnel related to immunization. The following courses focus on vaccine administration
You Call The Shots 
YCTS is an interactive training on vaccine-preventable diseases and vaccine recommendations. 
Pink Book Web On-Demand: Vaccine Administration 
A series of one-hour videos that provide overviews of vaccination principles, general best practices, and specific information about vaccine-preventable diseases and the vaccines that prevent them. 
Education Patients and Parents 
Resources to help educate patients and parents about receiving vaccines and how to locate their Immunization records.
Tips for Locating Old Immunization Records
